title: taraxacum noterophilum
intro: Taraxacum noterophilum, also known as the mountain dandelion, is a rare and endemic species of flowering plant in the genus Taraxacum, commonly found in mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum noterophilum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
